Off Calendar Aug-06-2002 Continued To Aug-13-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day, and with the witness sworn and examined, the Court determines the petitioner requires assistance of a Spanish Interpreter, and ordered the petitioner's hearing continued to August 13, 2002 at 9:00 AM.
